description_long: This is a medium-sized, round pumpkin with a rich, deep orange-brown skin and a short, green stem on top. The front face is intricately carved with a menacing, stylized jack-o'-lantern expression, featuring sharply angled eyes, a triangular nose, and a jagged, toothy mouth. The carved openings are clean and symmetrical, giving the pumpkin a sinister, Halloween-themed appearance. The surface of the pumpkin is slightly rough with visible natural striations and subtle color variations, enhancing its organic look. The interior appears hollow, as seen through the cutouts, suggesting it could be used to hold a candle or small light. No additional decorative accessories are present, and the pumpkin is shown against a plain, white background.
description: A carved jack-o'-lantern pumpkin with a fierce face, deep orange-brown skin, and a green stem. The surface is textured and the interior is hollow, visible through the sharp facial cutouts.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full carved face with sharp eyes, nose, and jagged mouth.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the facial cutouts and the roundness of the pumpkin.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the uncarved, smooth surface and the stem.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with partial visibility of the facial cutouts and the pumpkin's curvature.
attribute_carving_pattern: Traditional jack-o'-lantern style with sharply angled eyes, a triangular nose, and a jagged, toothy mouth. The pattern is symmetrical and designed to evoke a menacing expression, with clean cutouts and no additional motifs or etchings.
